narrative:
Monroe County has 8,640 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.1%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 33.3% of registrants.
